leadText: Purifying Salt (Japanese: きよめのしお Purifying Salt) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature Ability of Nacli's evolutionary line.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt grants the Pokémon immunity from all non-volatile status conditions and halves the Attack and Special Attack of an attacking Pokémon during damage calculation if targeted by a Ghost-type move. Rest fails if used by a Pokémon with Purifying Salt. If the Pokémon has a status condition and gains this Ability, the status condition will not be cured and remains in effect. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt grants the Pokémon immunity from all non-volatile status conditions and halves the Attack and Special Attack of an attacking Pokémon during damage calculation if targeted by a Ghost-type move.
